site.title: Travel Planner Template
site.tagline: A public-safe travel page should stay high level
site.description: Use this example as the shape for pages you are comfortable publishing. It keeps the page readable without exposing timed plans or private travel data.

cards.label: Use case
cards.title: Shareable overview
cards.text: Show the overall direction of a trip without exposing operational details.

cards.label: Scope
cards.title: Broad areas and themes
cards.text: Keep content at the neighborhood, category, and prep level.

cards.label: Guardrail
cards.title: Private data stays local
cards.text: Tickets, reservations, names, and detailed schedules belong in private trip files only.

sections.title: What to show
items: Category mix such as food, shopping, or nature

sections.title: Next trip flow
items: Copy the trip template into trips slash trip-id
Let the agent research and draft the private plan
Publish only the summary JSON if a public page is needed

footer_note: Public travel pages should explain the shape of a trip, not the exact movements or private booking data behind it.
